curation_notes: Locations derived directly from the patch diff. The patch changes yaml.load() to yaml.safe_load() in two functions (load_yaml and load_yamlf) in owlmixin/util.py. No sibling files contain the same unsafe yaml.load() pattern. Pre-assigned class insecure-deserialization (CWE-502) is correct — the vulnerability is unsafe YAML deserialization enabling arbitrary Python object instantiation.
